channel.title: VibeDeck Updates
channel.description: Product updates for VibeDeck — the local-first token usage tracker for AI coding agent CLIs.

item.title: v0.6.4 — Project usage attribution and token formatting fixes
item.description: Auto-verify projects from canonical git owner/repo paths, align dev and production endpoints for project attribution, and format token numbers with thousands separators across the dashboard.

item.title: v0.6.3 — Domain migration update
item.description: Domain references were updated to the VibeDeck repository and current branding.

item.title: 13 AI coding agent CLIs supported
item.description: Track Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Every Code, Kiro, Hermes Agent, GitHub Copilot, Kimi Code, oh-my-pi, and CodeBuddy in one unified dashboard.
